rationale: Redesign is complete and self-consistent; no trace of the checkout scare survives at 33a8ce8d. refutationPendingEntry is exactly {Slot,Round,Reason,Evidence} (json: slot/round/reason,omitempty/evidence,omitempty) — no Panels field anywhere in internal/complete or internal/panel non-test source. reconcilePendingRefutations(beadID string) error has zero panel reads (no panel.ForBead/panelTallyFn calls in its body; those only appear inside panelGate itself, lines <519, which is expected normal gate evaluation, not reconcile-time re-tally). panelGate is (*panel.Registration, error) at its one definition and all 11 call sites (1 prod in complete.go:387, 10 test sites across panel_advisory_test.go/panel_gate_e2e_test.go/panel_gate_layout_test.go) are 2-tuple — no arity mismatch. grep for dischargeEvidence/dischargeVerified/decodeDischargedEntries/writeRefutationDischargedMetadata/dischargedEntry/unionDischargedEntries/dedupeSortedSlugs/appliedOrigins across internal/ and cmd/ is empty; refutation_discharged only appears in historical docs/beads/review-json narrative (spec.md, plan.md, prior-round review artifacts, issues.jsonl), never in Go source. git diff ce9f5395..33a8ce8d -- internal/panel/ is empty (anti-gaming byte-unchanged, confirmed in the live worktree, read-only). In /tmp clone (git archive @33a8ce8d): go build ./... clean; gofmt -l ./cmd ./internal empty; go vet clean; go test ./internal/complete -run 'PanelRefuted|PanelGate' ALL PASS (incl. SatisfyFromMarker_PanelGone, NaturalResolution_NoObligation, MarkerCarriesReasonEvidence, HatchStillReconciles, AlreadyCoveredPending, MalformedPendingEntries); go test ./internal/panel -run 'Refut|Round|Dup|PanelGateDecision' ALL PASS; go test ./internal/bead -run 'MergeMetadata|GetMetadata' ALL PASS; full go test ./internal/panel ./internal/complete ./internal/bead ./cmd/mindspec ALL PASS; go test -race on the three panel-related packages ALL PASS. No orphaned edits, no half-applied state.

findings.note: Verified no residual damage from the reported git checkout -- scare: build/vet/gofmt/tests all green at 33a8ce8d, struct shape and function signatures match the BRIEF spec exactly, no orphaned symbol references anywhere in Go source.
All 11 call sites use the 2-tuple (*panel.Registration, error) form; grep -rn 'panelGate(' confirms uniform arity across prod and test code.

grep -rn for all named deleted symbols is empty in internal/ and cmd/; only historical doc/review-artifact mentions remain, which is expected and correct (they describe past rounds, not current code).
